ddls:
CREATE TABLE "force_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each force measurement */,
  "time_stamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "fx" REAL /* Force in the X direction */,
  "fy" REAL /* Force in the Y direction */,
  "fz" REAL /* Force in the Z direction */,
  "mx" REAL /* Moment about the X axis */,
  "my" REAL /* Moment about the Y axis */,
  "mz" REAL /* Moment about the Z axis */,
  "copx" REAL /* Center of Pressure in the X direction */,
  "copy" REAL /* Center of Pressure in the Y direction */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the measurement */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dynamic system where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the time of measurement */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the sensor at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_force_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_force_measurements_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES dynamic_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended calibration interval in days */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dynamic_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dynamic system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the dynamic system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was deployed */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Current status of the system */,
  "system_location" TEXT /* Current location of the system */,
  "system_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the system */,
  "system_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the system */,
  "system_model" TEXT /* Model of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_logout_time" TEXT /* Last logout time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the force measurement accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES force_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the force measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert or anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was detected */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., algorithm, manual) */,
  "alert_action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "alert_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES force_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_system_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dynamic system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed in the system */,
  "installation_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_system_mapping_installation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_system_mapping_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES dynamic_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_sensor_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the force measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Calibration date of the sensor at the time of measurement */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., live, simulated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_sensor_mapping_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_sensor_mapping_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_system_mapping ("sensor_id")
)
